title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Patni Computer Systems

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Patni Computer Systems
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Patni Computer Systems. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Patni Computer Systems:
Patni Computer Systems is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patni Computer Systems!
